query: INSERT INTO bot_config (`key`, `value`, description) VALUES ('botEnabled', 'true', 'Bot enabled') ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE `value` = 'true'; INSERT INTO bot_config (`key`, `value`, description) VALUES ('autopilotEnabled', 'true', 'Autopilot enabled') ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE `value` = 'true'; INSERT INTO bot_config (`key`, `value`, description) VALUES ('autopilotInterval', '2', 'Autopilot interval in hours') ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE `value` = '2'; SELECT `key`, `value` FROM bot_config WHERE `key` IN ('botEnabled', 'autopilotEnabled', 'autopilotInterval', 'killSwitch');
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3qjSsefs24zghQG.d5f38dec7f6c --database YZ9v9D6zNEEycYVBBKJ8og --execute INSERT INTO bot_config (`key`, `value`, description) VALUES ('botEnabled', 'true', 'Bot enabled') ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE `value` = 'true'; INSERT INTO bot_config (`key`, `value`, description) VALUES ('autopilotEnabled', 'true', 'Autopilot enabled') ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE `value` = 'true'; INSERT INTO bot_config (`key`, `value`, description) VALUES ('autopilotInterval', '2', 'Autopilot interval in hours') ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE `value` = '2'; SELECT `key`, `value` FROM bot_config WHERE `key` IN ('botEnabled', 'autopilotEnabled', 'autopilotInterval', 'killSwitch');
